title: CREDIT CORE
blurb: Credit is like a trust score for money! Today you'll learn what it is and why it matters.
mission: Learn what credit is and how a credit score works.
what: Credit is borrowing money now and paying it back later.
key: A credit score shows how much people can trust you with money.
swapBad: “Credit is free money I get to keep.”
swapGood: “Credit is borrowed money I pay back on time.”
rule: Pay it back on time and your score goes up.
star: A high score means people trust you with money.
goal: “Borrow $20, pay it back in a week, and watch my score climb.”
smartTip: A good score opens doors later in life!
gbBody: Some habits build trust; others make you look risky.
gbKey: Trust is earned one payment at a time.
tip: Always pay back what you borrow.
badWarn: Risky habits make your score drop fast!
goodNote: Good habits build a score people trust!

title: SCORE TOWER
blurb: Your credit score is like a tower you build over time. Stack good habits and watch it rise!
mission: Learn how to build and track your credit score over time.
what: Your score grows like a tower, one good habit at a time.
key: Towers go up slowly, so check your progress often.
swapGood: “My score climbs a little each month I do well.”
intro: Build your tower brick by brick…
rule: Add a good brick every month and never knock one down.
star: Small bricks stacked over time build a tall score.
goal: “Add 10 points a month by paying on time all year.”
smartTip: One missed payment can topple months of work!
gbBody: Some habits make your tower rise; others make it fall.
gbKey: It rises slowly but falls fast.
badWarn: One slip can knock your tower down fast!
goodNote: Steady bricks build a tower that lasts!

title: BORROWING BAY
blurb: Borrowing can help you, but only if you can pay it back. Learn the smart way to borrow!
mission: Learn to borrow only what you can repay.
what: Borrowing is using money now that you must pay back later.
key: Only borrow what you know you can pay back.
swapBad: “I'll borrow a lot and figure it out later.”
swapGood: “I'll borrow $10 because I can pay it back next week.”
rule: Never borrow more than you can pay back.
star: Smart borrowing means you can always pay it back.
goal: “Borrow $10 for a real need and repay it within one week.”
smartTip: Borrow only when you have a plan to repay!
gbBody: Smart borrowing helps you; risky borrowing traps you.
gbKey: If you can't repay it, don't borrow it.
tip: Make a payback plan before you borrow.
badWarn: Borrowing too much can trap you in debt!
goodNote: Smart borrowing keeps you free and safe!

title: TRUST EXCHANGE
blurb: Lenders lend to people they trust. Learn how to become someone money-people believe in!
mission: Learn how lenders trust people who pay on time.
what: Trust is when lenders believe you'll pay them back.
key: Lenders trust people who always pay on time.
swapBad: “They should just trust me because I said so.”
swapGood: “They trust me because I always pay on time.”
rule: Keep every promise and trust grows over time.
star: Trust is your most valuable money tool.
goal: “Pay back 5 loans on time so lenders fully trust me.”
smartTip: Trust takes years to build, seconds to break!
gbBody: Some habits earn trust; others lose it fast.
gbKey: Trust is earned slowly and lost quickly.
tip: Keep every money promise you make.
badWarn: Breaking trust makes lenders say no!

title: REPAYMENT RUNWAY
blurb: Paying on time is the #1 thing that builds your score. Get ready for takeoff!
mission: Learn why on-time payments are the most important factor.
what: Payment history is your record of paying bills on time.
key: On-time payments are the #1 thing that builds your score.
swapBad: “A late payment is no big deal.”
swapGood: “I always pay on time — it's my #1 score booster.”
intro: Get ready for a smooth takeoff…
rule: Pay on or before the due date, every time.
star: On-time payments are your #1 score booster.
goal: “Pay all my bills on time for 12 months straight.”
smartTip: Even one late payment can hurt your score!
gbBody: On-time payments lift your score; late ones drag it down.
gbKey: On-time is the biggest factor of all.
tip: Set a reminder before every due date.
badWarn: Late payments hurt your score the most!
goodNote: On-time payments power your whole score!

title: CREDIT LIMIT LAB
blurb: Your limit is how much you can borrow. The trick? Don't use too much of it!
mission: Learn to keep balances low compared to your credit limit.
what: Utilization is how much of your limit you actually use.
key: Keep your balance under 30% of your limit.
swapBad: “I'll use my whole limit since I can.”
swapGood: “I'll only use a small part of my limit.”
rule: Keep what you use under 30% of your limit.
goal: “With a $100 limit, keep my balance under $30.”
smartTip: Using less than 30% keeps your score strong!
gbBody: Low balances help your score; high balances hurt it.
gbKey: Lower use means a higher score.
badWarn: Using too much of your limit drops your score!
goodNote: Low balances keep your score shining!

title: REPORT OBSERVATORY
blurb: Your credit report is a record of your money life. Learn to read it and spot mistakes!
mission: Learn to read your credit report and fix errors.
what: A credit report is a record of how you've used credit.
key: Check your report often and fix any mistakes you find.
swapGood: “I check my report and fix errors right away.”
stepsSub: Three steps to a clean report
rule: Read your report and report errors fast.
star: A clean report keeps your score accurate.
goal: “Check my report once a year and fix any errors I spot.”
smartTip: Fixing one error can boost your score!
gbBody: A clean report helps you; a messy one with errors hurts.
gbKey: Errors can lower a score you earned.
tip: Check your report at least once a year.
badWarn: Unfixed errors can drag your score down!
goodNote: A clean report shows your true score!
